commit.message:
fix(access): handle non-JSON 500 responses in OTP send flow

When the API returns a raw 500 (e.g. "Internal Server Error" text),
the JSON parse threw a confusing SyntaxError shown to users. Now
checks response.ok before parsing JSON and treats server errors
as retriable, falling back to legacy submit.

Root cause of the 500: otp_challenges table missing from database
(migration not applied). Prisma client regenerated and redeployed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Count all synced contracts in import response, not just changed ones

Previously only contracts with missing embeddings were counted as 'updated',
so re-running import showed 0/0 even when all contracts were successfully
present. Now every existing contract counts as updated so the response
accurately reflects "N contracts synced".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Align Sunrise/Sunset with Hourly Forecast via sub-row grid split

- Split cards section into two independent 2-col grids:
  Sub-row 1: SunriseSunsetCard | HourlyForecast (default stretch — same height)
  Sub-row 2: WeatherDetailsCards | WeeklyForecast (items-start — natural height)

- Restructure SunriseSunsetCard (Option B):
  Arc SVG now uses full card width (no times squeezing sides), anchored
  to bottom of flex-1 space so it scales ~50% taller than before.
  Rise/Set times moved to a row below the arc with a subtle divider.
  Card is h-full so CSS Grid stretch makes it exactly match HourlyForecast.

- Add WeatherDetailsCards named export (Wind, Humidity, Pressure,
  Visibility, AQ) for use in sub-row 2.

commit.message:
M20: OTA Review Syndication

- Add source, external_id, source_url, source_rating_raw, reviewer_name columns to reviews table
- Make reservation_id, guest_id, review_token_id nullable for OTA reviews
- importOtaReviews() server action: JSON import, Zod validation, dedup by external_id
- Rating normalization: Booking.com 0–10 → 1–5, others passthrough
- Import dialog at /reviews with row-level error reporting
- Source filter pills on reviews dashboard
- Source badge + reviewer_name display in booking engine
- REST API reviews endpoint: LEFT JOIN to include OTA reviews
- M19 marked TODO (skipped)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: GitHub share export with animated SVG preview (#35)

* feat: add GitHub share export (--format github) with animated SVG

Add `--format github` CLI option that generates two embeddable outputs for
GitHub PRs, READMEs, and issue comments:

1. **Markdown summary** — Structured session overview with collapsible details,
   user prompts as blockquotes, condensed tool actions, risk signals, and
   branding footer. Designed for copy-paste into PR descriptions.

2. **Animated SVG preview** — Terminal-styled dark-themed animation showing
   key session phases (CSS @keyframes, no JS). Renders natively on GitHub.
   Includes task overview, selected step highlights, and stats summary frame.

Features:
- CJK-aware text wrapping (visual width calculation)
- Intelligent phase selection (prioritizes test failures, file creation)
- Grouped consecutive reads for concise summaries
- Risk signal detection (heavily modified files, test failures, compactions)
- Content clip-path prevents SVG text overflow
- --replay-url, --no-svg, --copy options
- Cross-platform clipboard support (pbcopy/xclip/xsel)
- 21 new tests covering both markdown and SVG generation

Usage: `vibe-replay --format github [--copy] [--replay-url URL]`

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

* docs: add SVG preview example for GitHub share feature

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

* fix: address review feedback for GitHub share export

- SVG clipPath ID uses session ID to prevent collisions on same page
- escMd covers all markdown special chars (backtick, backslash)
- formatDuration(0) now returns "0s" instead of null
- collectFilesChanged uses shortPath() to avoid basename collisions
- Frame-0 gets animation-fill-mode:backwards to prevent blank flash
- "View full replay →" in summary frame conditional on replayUrl
- CLI: validate --format and --replay-url values, deduplicate slug logic
- Replace preview SVG with English/generic content
- Add CJK text wrapping tests (visual width calculation)
- Add selectKeyPhases order maintenance test
- Strengthen truncation test assertions

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

* refactor: move GitHub export from CLI flag to TUI menu + editor UI

Remove --format, --replay-url, --no-svg, --copy CLI flags. GitHub
export is now accessible from:

1. TUI share menu: "Export for GitHub" option after session selection
2. Editor UI: "Export for GitHub" button in the annotation panel
3. Server API: POST /api/export/github endpoint

The replay URL is auto-detected from previously published gists.
SVG is always generated (no --no-svg needed). Markdown is copied
to clipboard in the editor UI via navigator.clipboard.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

with `pr-7` padding on the container, so the 💬 icon sits inside
the row instead of overlapping the ▶ expand arrow.

* feat: add display modes (All/Compact/Custom) replacing filter toggles

Replace confusing filter system with three clear display modes:
- All: everything expanded, no filtering
- Compact: assistant groups show summary stats + last text-response, expandable
- Custom: granular toggles (Prompts Only, Collapse Tools, Hide Thinking)

Introduces EffectivePrefs derived from DisplayMode so consumers don't
need to know about modes. Default mode is Compact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: replace settings dropdown with theme toggle + Custom popover

Remove the gear/settings dropdown. Theme toggle is now a standalone
button (☾/☀). Custom mode toggles appear as a popover when clicking
the Custom button in the segmented control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Custom popover clipped, landing→replay on mode click, fill screen on load

1. Move Custom popover outside overflow-hidden container so it's visible
2. Auto-land (skip landing hero) when user clicks a display mode button
3. Seek to second user prompt on initial load so screen is filled

The initialSeekIndex computation used useMemo but it wasn't imported,
causing a ReferenceError that crashed the entire component.

commit.message:
Initial commit: multi-sport AI coaching platform

Pluggable sport module system supporting snowboarding, skiing, running, and
home workouts. Includes FastAPI backend with sport registry, per-sport coach
logic and biomechanical analysis, parameterized pose estimation and video
annotation, React 19 frontend with sport selector, dynamic coaching guidance,
and code-split SVG illustrations. Training pipeline accepts --sport flag with
per-sport JSON configs.

commit.message:
feat: add link-only invite option — coaches can generate shareable invite links

Coaches can now invite athletes via email OR by generating a one-time
shareable link (for texting, WhatsApp, etc.). The link is tied to the
coach so athletes auto-join the correct roster on registration.

- Schema: make Invitation.email optional (nullable for link invites)

commit.message:
fix: prevent sibling import pollution for main/test packages (FIX-041)

Root cause: when analyzing a main/test package file in a directory with
other main/test files (e.g., examples/), the analyzer scanned ALL sibling
files' imports and built dotImportPkgs from all of them. This caused
types from unrelated sibling imports (e.g., collection_immutable.Array)
to compete with the current file's imports (collection_mutable.Array)
during type resolution, leading to non-deterministic wrong package
references in generated code.

Fix: skip directory-discovered sibling scanning for main/test packages.
These are independent programs sharing a directory, not multi-file
packages. Multi-file packages use explicit --package-files instead.

Also restores the mutable_collections example to use squares.Map[int]()
instead of the manual loop workaround.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

typed declarations for self-validation: property IRI validity, kind/value-type
conformance, functional cardinality, IriRef target resolution, datatype range
conformance. Harden Rules 1-3, add quantum_scope EmpiricalVerification branch

commit.message:
Add tiered access control and self-describing API

Implements discover/read/write access tiers so new models can safely
connect to the engine. Unknown applications default to discover tier
(health + describe only). Adds self-documenting describe endpoint,
introspect for welcome messages, and access.grant/list/revoke for
managing per-application permissions. Includes CONTINUITY_API.md
reference documentation for external consumers.

Fix infinite loop in spec-workflow command aliases

Command files were telling Claude to "Invoke the spec-workflow skill"
via the Skill tool, which loaded SKILL.md, which referenced
/spec-workflow in its invocation docs, triggering another Skill tool
call in an infinite loop. Changed commands to read SKILL.md directly
and added explicit anti-recursion instructions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Label hybrid LR table accurately, derive forensic stats from computed values

- Report and README now say "BSW strict, other parties base" instead of
  misleading "Independence-first LR" for the full table
- sec_skew_kurt() computes BSW skew/kurtosis from residuals instead of
  hardcoding stale 0.53/3.8 (now shows +0.62/5.8)
- README removes specific Benford/skew numbers, defers to report to
  eliminate two-source-of-truth drift

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(gates): use dynamic OSM gate positions on 2D map

- Add getGates() method to useAirportConfig hook to expose OSM gates
- Update AirportOverlay.tsx to use OSM gates when available
- Fix merge_osm_config to set terminals field directly
- Falls back to hardcoded positions only when OSM returns no gates

Previously gate markers were at incorrect hardcoded positions while
aircraft were at correct OSM positions from the backend.

repository.description: Airport Digital Twin - Databricks platform demo with real-time flight data, 2D/3D visualization, and ML predictions

commit.message:
Dev (#93)

* feat: changed the hold threshold for short term

* chord: modified code structure and comment

* gitignore: ignored data/

* feat: implement v3.3 consensus formula alignment with live system

- Changed consensus formula from rolling_mean/13 to net_weight/abs_weight
  matching live SignalWindow exactly
- HOLD signals (weight=0) now excluded from both numerator and denominator
  instead of diluting consensus toward 0
- Moved consensus/hold_ratio computation inside Numba loop using running
  sums with O(1) eviction per window
- HOLD generation now properly affected by vol_threshold parameter:
  - when volatility < vol_threshold: all directional signals become HOLD
  - when volatility >= vol_threshold: only divergence check emits HOLD
- Pre-computed effective values on-the-fly during eviction (no array alloc)
- Results: 21 trades, $413 profit/trade, 14.6% max drawdown
- Optimized thresholds: c_short=0.1, c_mid=1.0, c_struct=0.71, vol=0.2%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add data/ to gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: update optimized thresholds from v3.3 backtest

v3.3 aligned consensus formula produces higher-quality thresholds
that transfer directly to the live system:
- c_short: 1.0 → 0.1
- c_mid:   0.5 → 1.0 (requires full mid-term agreement)
- c_struct: 0.78 → 0.71
- vol_threshold: 0.45 → 0.2%
Result: 21 trades over 6 months, $413 profit/trade, 57.1% win rate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: enabled the deploy to the GCE

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Dockerfile iyileştirmeleri - multi-stage build ve güvenlik

- Node.js 18 -> 20 yükseltildi
- 3 aşamalı build yapısı (deps, builder, runner)
- Non-root user ile güvenlik (appuser:appgroup)
- NODE_ENV=production eklendi
- PORT 3000 ve HOSTNAME ortam değişkenleri
- nginx dizinleri için doğru sahiplik ayarları

fix: resolve frontend-backend field mismatches and display bugs

- Fix schedule URL paths (/scheduling/ -> /schedule/) in api_service.dart

- Add customer_name and boat_name to WorkOrderOut schema and enrich responses
- Fix bay type field name (bay_type -> type) in bay_board_page.dart
